title: Luscious Italian Veal Casserole
description: An earthy, light and cozy Italian casserole that blends tender veal shanks with dark brown soft sugar, dehydrate-style aromatics, and a silky braising liquid for a comforting meal.
instructions: Season the veal shanks with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe pot over medium-high heat and brown the shanks on all sides.
Remove the shanks and set aside.
Add tomato paste to the pot and cook for 2 minutes, stirring.
Deglaze with red wine, scraping up browned bits, and let it reduce by half.
Stir in dried oregano, dried rosemary, dark brown soft sugar, and vegetable broth.
Return the veals to the pot, cover, and transfer to the oven.
Bake for 80 minutes, turning once, until the veal is fork-tender.
Serve hot garnished with fresh parsley.
